name: EBV_full_genome
description: Epstein-Barr virus (HHV-4) gamma-1-herpesvirus complete genome: linear dsDNA ~172 kb (B95-8 reference NC_007605.1 lacks a ~12 kb deletion present in wild-type strains; wild-type EBV is ~184 kb). Genome organization: 0.5 kb terminal repeats (TR) flanking the unique region, with internal repeats IR1/W (3.1 kb major internal repeat, 6-12 copies of the BamHI-W unit), IR2-IR4, and the EBNA-LP-coding repeats. Establishes lifelong latency in B cells with multiple latency programs (0/I/II/III) defined by which EBNAs and LMPs are expressed. Causally associated with Burkitt lymphoma, Hodgkin lymphoma, nasopharyngeal carcinoma, gastric carcinoma, and lymphoproliferative disorders in immunosuppressed hosts.
expected_copy_count: 1-50 episomal copies per latent B cell; 1000s of linear genomes per lytic cell
